The '''TurboToo''' was type of [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] [[Engine/Legends|engine]]. The powerful [[TrailMaker III]] [[Speeder bike/Legends|speeder bike]], manufactured by [[Mobquet Swoops and Speeders/Legends|Mobquet Swoops and Speeders]], operated with a giant TurboToo repulsorlift engine.<ref name="SWS" />
